EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITraceResults4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to network source information and network trace results with first units and last units.

[Guid("59F628ED-A65D-43A4-BF49-02F1109B2E20")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITraceResults4 : ITraceResults3, ITraceResults2, ITraceResults

function IUNFunction

object

IStringArray Warnings { get; }
